input.idea_title: the bug that made my agent sound generic
input.voice_profile: mostly lowercase, short lines, low emoji, direct
input.anchor_summary: User posts often: ship -> problem -> fix -> takeaway. Avoid LinkedIn phrases. Keep it X-native.

drafts.text:
i kept wondering why my agent sounded generic.
turns out i wasn’t retrieving the user’s posts at query time.

scrape ≠ personalize.

fixed it by pulling 5 relevant anchors per request + injecting a short summary.
now it actually sounds like *them*.

if your agent feels like a corporate faq bot, it’s probably not a model problem.
it’s a data plumbing problem.

we were scraping posts… and not using them.
added query-time retrieval + a novelty gate.
instant upgrade.

spent way too long tweaking prompts.
wasn’t even the issue.

i was scraping posts but never pulling them back in when the user asked for ideas.
added retrieval anchors.
now it stops sounding like a template machine.
